calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HCI SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses Of Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents.

Defendant's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories 12.2 and 12.3 will be granted to the extent hereinafter set forth. Defendant's motion to compel response to requests for production of documents will be denied as moot, the matter having resolved by agreement of the parties. (see word minutes for full details)

Defendant's counsel submits a proposed order in Word format consistent with the foregoing by email approved as to form by Plaintiff's Counsel to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
